summary:
EXP-468 authored — single-patch insertion of new
synthesis section into the Timestamp Error tab in build-scripts/generate-html.js (between
of ts-april-2026-update and the ds-ts-related-callout div). Closes HOL-MISSING.c2 Hole #3 (REACTIVE-PROSE-VS-STRUCTURAL-FIX pattern). ~340 words; review_class=deep-attack (new cross-cutting argument with explicit falsifiability commitment). Companion to EXP-467 — together they implement the symmetric falsifiability promise at both the Overview entry point and the Timestamp Error meta-finding. HTML rebuild required; no data file touched.
